The native's good fortune starts from his 26th year. The
native will get married between 26 and 28 years of his age. He
will move into a new house between his 39th and 42nd year. ,Then,
he will build his own house and earu much wealth through various
enterprises.
The Sun is in con junction with Venus and has Rahu in the fifth house.
So, some of the native's children may not survive.
He will live a happy and prosperous life till his 71st year. His children
will be prosperous.
